acquisition method: the mass spectrometer operating in automatic data dependent switching mode.
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 0.55 M iodoacetamide (IAA) at room temperature for 15 min
cleavage agent: 1 μg of Sequence Grade Trypsin (Promega) was added
instrument: loaded onto a QExactive high resolution accurate mass spectrometer
labeling: with log2 normalised LFQ intensities ranging between 21.6–35.9
reduction reagent: reduced with 0.5 M dithiothreitol (DTT) at 56°C for 20 min
